---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement to the reference app or runtime
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What limitation or gap are you trying to address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Architectural Impact

Does this belong in `src/app`, `src/ui`, `src/gfx`, or `web/`?

## Testing

What new behavior should be covered by tests or browser verification?
